behaviors: Genital Exposure: The student removes, lowers, or manipulates clothing (e.g., pulling down pants, lifting a skirt, or lowering underwear) such that the buttocks, genitals, or pubic area are visible to others, or places one or both hands inside the front or back of their pants in a manner that is observable to others.

Passive Work Refusal: The student does not begin an assigned task within [X] minutes of the instruction being given, or begins but stops working for [X] or more minutes without a teacher-approved reason, or submits or presents work with three or more items left blank or incomplete when the assignment contained sufficient time for completion.
antecedents: Staff attention is diverted or removed (Att)
Absence or presence of a specific person (Att)
Loud, bright, chaotic, or crowded environment (Sel)
Transition to a different activity or location (Tan)
Prompt, redirection or to correction of student work (Esc)(Att)
Instruction, direction, or request to complete task (Esc)(Att)
Object/activity delayed, denied, interrupted or terminated (Tan)
consequences: Staff attention is diverted or removed (Att)
activities: Self care or daily living tasks
